welcome: Hi! I'm the PEPL support assistant. Ask a question or pick a topic below for quick answers about our services, location, and how to reach us.
fallback: Thanks for your message. For detailed inquiries, please call us at +91 7030-9088-11, request a quote at +91 7030-9088-12, or visit our contact page. A team member will follow up during business hours.

faqs.question: What services do you offer?
faqs.answer: PEPL provides three core services: Engineering & Design (plant layout, P&I, structural design, project management), Fabrication & Erection (industrial structures, nuclear/chemical plants, stainless and carbon steel piping), and Operations & Support (O&M, shutdown maintenance, inspection, and manpower services).

faqs.question: How do I get a quote?
faqs.answer: Call our quote line at +91 7030-9088-12 or fill out the contact form on our website. Share your project scope and our team will get back to you.

faqs.question: How can I contact you?
faqs.answer: For inquiries, call +91 7030-9088-11. For quotes, call +91 7030-9088-12. You can also email pep.tarapur@gmail.com or use the contact form on our website.

faqs.question: Where are you located?
faqs.answer: Our registered office is at Plot No: G-52, Tarapur Industrial Area, Mumbai Metropolitan Region, Maharashtra, India — Pin 401506.

faqs.question: Which industries do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Nuclear, Chemical, Energy, Oil & Gas, and broader industrial sectors. PEPL is an esteemed vendor for the Department of Atomic Energy (DAE) in India.

faqs.question: What kind of projects have you done?
faqs.answer: PEPL has completed 209 projects including nuclear process piping, chemical plant erection, cross-country utility pipelines, and industrial structural fabrication. Visit our Projects page for examples.

faqs.question: Are you hiring?
faqs.answer: To apply for a position at Plant Engineering People Pvt. Ltd., send your cover letter and C.V. to pep.tarapur@gmail.com.

faqs.question: Tell me about PEPL
faqs.answer: Plant Engineering People Pvt. Ltd. (PEPL) is a professionally managed engineering company established in 1999, led by a qualified Mechanical Engineer with over 30 years of experience. We specialize in stainless steel pipe fabrication and engineering for critical industries.
